items.title: Access and arrival guide
items.description: Key collection, alarm, heating, advance storage access and the departure checklist for the day of your booking.

items.title: Hall facilities and equipment
items.description: Kitchen stock, serving items, tables, chairs, stage setup and the practical housekeeping notes hirers need most often.

items.title: Layout and outdoor spaces
items.description: A simpler layout overview, downloadable floor plan and the updated policy that outdoor spaces are not available for private hire.

items.title: Terms and conditions of hire
items.description: A web summary of the hire agreement, with the full February 2024 terms and conditions available as a renamed PDF.

items.title: Outdoor-space source plan
items.description: The original colour-coded outdoor-space PDF retained for reference, alongside the clearer web guidance page.

items.title: Sound and lighting guide
items.description: A quick guide to using the stage sound and lighting equipment in the hall.

items.title: Community consultation summary
items.description: A short overview of the 2022 consultation about village life and how the Hub can support it.

items.title: Community consultation full report
items.description: The complete report for anyone who wants the fuller context behind the consultation findings.
